series_metadata.series_description: In accordance with ORC 4765.11 the state Board of EMS (via Division of EMS) issues a certificate of accreditation to institutions who meet the criteria outlined in The O.A.C. to providing training for individuals seeking certification as a First Responder or EMT. These applications include documentation of the how the courses will be conducted. An accreditation is valid for a period of three years, at which time an application for renewal is submitted. Limited information from application (institution name, address, telephone number, fax number, contact person, level of accreditation, as well as accreditation expiration date when issued, is maintained in an electronic data base.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: Permanent or program accreditation status is no longer active. Information updated as needed. ; Paper: Applications are maintained one accreditation cycle () or renewed
